findings.title: agent_reports omitted from delete-cascade (AGENT_REFS) and rename_agent -> cross-tenant report disclosure under agent-name reuse
findings.exploit: Rename agent alpha->alpha-v2 (report rows keep agent_name=alpha, orphaned); another tenant creates a new agent named alpha (name immediately free); new owner reads previous tenant's report payloads via GET /api/reports/{id}.
findings.impact: Cross-tenant disclosure of agent report payloads on shared instances; secondary report-history loss on rename and orphan accumulation on purge (L-03 cascade invariant violated, not covered by canary).
findings.recommendation: Add AgentRef('agent_reports','agent_name',Policy.CASCADE) to AGENT_REFS and include agent_reports in rename_agent (or route rename through cascade_rename); add a #918 cascade/rename test. _EXEMPT alternative keeps the exposure and is not recommended without read-time identity gating.
